goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'kings lynn'.
The train should 'arrive by 20:30' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'gonville hotel'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'postcode', and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from kings lynn
The train should arrive by 20:30 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get price, departure time, and train ID
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called gonville hotel
Make sure you get star of the hotel, postcode, and whether they have free parking
